search_queries_used: site:kdigo.org 2024 CKD guideline GFR albuminuria chronicity monitoring referral
site:dha.gov.ae type 2 diabetes renal urine ACR annual review
candidate_sources_rejected: automatic CKD stage, progression or diabetic-kidney-disease diagnosis
automatic medicine change, renal referral or monitoring interval
automatic diagnosis, investigation, treatment, medication, dose, procedure, referral, escalation, or discharge instructions
search snippets, landing pages, and broad source-family matches without an exact applicable section
rejection_reasons: One eGFR or ACR result does not establish chronicity or cause.
Treatment and referral remain clinician decisions.
Autonomous clinical output is outside this documentation-only research programme and was not mapped.
Only opened exact official documents and directly applicable sections were accepted as evidence.
population_applicability: People with diabetes undergoing kidney screening; age, pregnancy, acute illness, CKD cause and existing kidney disease require additional context.
UAE_applicability: DHA is UAE-direct for adult type 2 diabetes telehealth; KDIGO requires UAE laboratory, nephrology and referral adaptation.
recency_verification: KDIGO 2024 and DHA Issue 2 exact sections were reviewed on 2026-07-14.
superseded_check: Current registered official versions were identified.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact KDIGO detection and chronicity section supports interval change, associated context, relevant negatives and clinician-reviewed GFR, albuminuria, prior trend or imaging documentation without diagnosing CKD from one result.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports GFR and urine-albumin testing, repeat confirmation, prior GFR or albuminuria trends, imaging, history, and the minimum chronicity context without diagnosing CKD from one result.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact albuminuria section supports patient concerns, focused assessment and urine-result context only when assessed or reviewed; it does not infer chronicity or cause.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports ACR, PCR, urinalysis, quantitative confirmation, and interpretation factors including haematuria, menstruation, exercise, and infection.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact monitoring section supports clinician concern, entered plan and arranged follow-up only when decided, without generating a stage or interval.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Supports clinician-arranged GFR and albuminuria monitoring and evaluation of a greater-than-20-percent eGFR change or ACR doubling without mapping fixed legacy intervals.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The exact DHA annual-review section supports measured vital signs, weight or BMI and home-monitoring context for adult type 2 diabetes kidney screening.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

unresolved_source_gaps: Creatinine, eGFR, ACR, urinalysis, haematuria, prior trends, acute illness, medicine, CKD stage, cause, diagnosis, treatment and referral remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
